headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.gstatic.com https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.google.com https://api.groq.com https://fcm.googleapis.com https://www.gstatic.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
